DESCRIPTION: The youngest prince of Wyverngarde's royal family. He's somewhat of a spoiled brat and has a habit of using words without understanding their meaning. The difference between himself and Aster is night and day.

A prosecutor from the nobility who hails from House Steelwind: one of the Four Pillar Families in Wyverngarde. She's the daughter of Grand General Lucio Steelwind, leader of Wyverngarde's military. It's hard to read her motivations, even with the Eye of Horus.

The Crown Prince of Wyverngarde's royal family and next in line to the throne. Despite his status, he seems to be a big admirer of me and Ms. Tymora. He appears to hate the injustices perpetuated by the nobility as much as I do.
A mysterious woman who seems to be related to House Frega: one of the Four Pillar Families. She's currently working with Ms. Tymora to negotiate some kind of deal with William Frega.

The eldest sister of the Frega family. Through her thoughts, I saw that she's the true culprit behind William Frega's murder. I think… Ms. Tymora knows this and is still defending her. Am I really doing the right thing?

The eldest sister of the Frega family. I successfully proved that she murdered William Frega during her trial. Her soul now belongs to a demon known as "The Empress of Discord". I wish there was a way to help her.
A professor who teaches magic at Wyverngarde's Imperial Academy. She's quite abrasive to just about everyone. She seems to have a particular disdain for commoners.
The only daughter of Flinhart McCoy. She's cheerful and sweet… and also a little intimidating.
The only daughter of the McCoy family. She was adopted by them when she was only an infant, and she has the ability to use magic. Could she have noble blood?

My personal bodyguard. She accompanies me everywhere to keep me safe. She's energetic and is really competitive. She seems to have an abnormally high strength despite her small figure. She's an adept fighter and has saved my life on multiple occasions.
My personal bodyguard and my closest confidante. She's cheerful and sweet <s>and beautiful</s>. She has this way of brightening my day, and I'm happy I get to work with her.

My personal bodyguard and my closest confidante… She's really the person I trust the most, and it's nice to be able to rely on someone. I always feel happier whenever she's around, and she always has this way of brightening the room she's in. She's an adept fighter and has saved my life more times than I can count. She looks really cool when she's fighting. Every fluid movement she makes looks effortless on her part. I get a little nervous whenever I look directly at her. It feels like I'm staring at the sun or a really radiant jewel or something. She always teases me when she catches me staring at her, but she never looks mad. I don't know.

<s>I THINK I MIGHT BE IN LOVE WITH HER! I THINK I'M IN LOVE WITH HER, AND I HAVE NO IDEA WHAT TO DO!  WE'RE LITERALLY TOGETHER ALL THE TIME, AND I CAN'T IMAGINE HOW MORTIFYING IT'D BE IF I TOLD HER ABOUT THIS AND SHE DIDN'T FEEL THE SAME! WHAT AM I THINKING?! SHE OBVIOUSLY DOESN'T SEE ME THAT WAY! SHE'S LITERALLY THE MOST BEAUTIFUL PERSON I'VE EVER MET! SHE OBVIOUSLY HAVE BETTER OPTIONS THAN ME! SHE'S MY COWORKER, AND THESE FEELINGS ARE COMPLETELY UNPROFESSIONAL! SHE'S MY BEST FRIEND! </s>

…She's my best friend. I like being around her. She makes me happy. I don't know what to do…

The head of House Sibyl and the Minister of Justice. Her noble house is one of the Four Pillar families and is the most powerful of them. Her family has managed the judicial and legislative branches of Wyverngarde's government for generations.

A mysterious and almost ethereal girl. It's hard to read what she's really thinking. I'm guilty to admit it, but I always feel a sense of dread whenever I'm around her. She seems nice, however, I just need to do a better job of checking my preconceptions.
The demon known as the Empress of Discord. She's the one who's behind all of this. No matter what it takes, I need to stop her.
Lord Haroldson's pet monkey and magical familiar. They can speak to each other telepathically, but he's usually hanging off of Harold's shoulder.
Lord Haroldson's pet monkey and magical familiar. He's actually extremely intelligent when he's wearing the Armbands of Intellect.
The ringleader of the largest criminal organization in Wyverngarde. He seems to be planning some sort of revolution and is working with Ruby Tymora for that purpose.
Leader of a revolutionary faction in Kornhaven and owner of the McCoy Tavern. He seems to have an extreme grudge against mages and the nobility, but that sentiment tends to be common nowadays.
The leader of House Pierce. He is the ruling noble of Kornhaven and the villages nearby. He appears to be involved in Prosecutor Steelwind's case against Celeste, but to what extent?
A local punk who likes to stir up trouble. I remember him from when I used to live here. It seems not a lot has changed…
The leader of House Haroldson. He appears to be an archaeologist and historian. His noble house owns the Haroldson Hall of History located in Homerith. That can't actually be his real name…
The leader of House Haroldson. He appears to be an archaeologist and historian. His noble house owns the Haroldson Hall of History located in Homerith. That can't actually his real name…
The leader of House Haroldson. He appears to be an archaeologist and historian. His noble house owns the Haroldson Hall of History located in Homerith. That can't actually his real name…
A custodian who works at the Imperial Academy. He looks exhausted. He looks like he's struggling just to stay awake whenever I talk to him.
Celeste's mother. I can't imagine what she's going through… She not only has to grieve her husband's death but also deal with her daughter's arrest for his murder.

The middle child of William Frega. She seems conflicted between her father's death and Beatrice's arrest for his murder. She's much kinder than Miriam. It's hard to believe they grew up in the same home.
The young head of House Asclepius: a noble house known for their knowledge and studies in necromancy. He seems to be friends with Laefe Frega.
DISPLAY NAME TRANSLATION: 拉扎瑞克·阿斯克勒庇俄斯

DESCRIPTION: The leader of House von Sanctus: the weakest of the Four Pillar Families. He stands at the head of the kingdom's commerce and international trade. I've met children who play chess better than him.
The head of House von Sanctus and the Duke of Commerce. His noble house is one of the Four Pillar Families. His family is responsible for managing trade and commerce throughout Wyverngarde.

The head of House Steelwind and the Grand General of Wyverngarde's military. He is apparently responsible for the death of countless revolutionaries. He seems to have a strained relationship with his daughter.
A small winged demon who acts as Beatrice's familiar. Supposedly, Beatrice can only see through his eyes due to her blindness. To think that demons are actually real…

The spoiled daughter of House Frega: one of the Four Pillar Families. She's extremely arrogant, but appears to excel at her studies at the Imperial Academy. I can't imagine she has many genuine friends.

My dramatic childhood friend. She's a commoner who was born a mage. Through Dracogen's patronage, she was able to open up her own restaurant like she'd always dreamed about. I should have done more to keep in contact with her after I left...
The harbourmaster of Aurinax. He was friends with my mother before she was killed. He would always watch over me whenever my mother was busy with her job as a merchant. He taught me how to fish.
The grumpy and apathetic leader of the Arcane Inquisition. He's had a personal grudge against Ms. Tymora for as long as I can remember.
The Scaled Lord and the creator of all Arcane magic. I'd only known from legends until this moment. I can hardly believe that ancient dragons actually exist…
A mysterious lord who appears to be close to the royal family. Apparently, he's the royal advisor to the King of Wyverngarde. I wonder why I've never heard of him before…
My mentor and legal guardian. She raised me after my mother was killed and taught me everything I know about being an attorney.
A carriage driver who claims to have witnessed Celeste murdering Flinhart. He must be lying to cover for someone.

The merchant owner of the Dracogen Trading Company. He's an investor who has helped many commoners start their businesses in Aurinax. He seems to care deeply about workers' rights and enforces that ideology in his business.
The elderly headmaster of the Wyverngarde Imperial Academy. He appears to be close to Wallace and facilitated his studies in necromancy.
The devout leader of the Church of Bahamut. I don't think I've met anyone who reveres the Scaled Lord as much as he does.
The best boy. The bestest boy who ever bested a boy.
A practicing defense attorney and the best chess player in all of Wyverngarde.
A practicing defense attorney and the best chess player in all of Wyverngarde.
Works for the kitchen staff at the Imperial Academy. She works alongside her sister, Valerie. She seems to be on edge due to Bellwether's murder.

Works for the kitchen staff at the Imperial Academy. She works alongside her sister, Valentina. She's softer-spoken when compared to her sister, but she also seems to be on edge due to Bellwether's murder.
A student at the Wyverngarde Imperial Academy. He's extremely anxious and looks ready to flee at any moment's notice. He's very secretive about the type of magic he studies.

The head of House Frega and the Duke of Finance. His noble house is one of the Four Pillar families and responsible for tax collection and the exchange of resources. House Frega owns and controls every banking house in Wyverngarde.
I also remember him. Back then, whenever Gavin was causing trouble, Wyatt was never far behind. It seems not a lot has changed there either…

DISPLAY NAME TRANSLATION: 迈尔斯·瓦林·卡尔·加拉德
